title: How to build reliable software with AI agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech discusses how AI coding agents can generate technical debt without proper verification. The video emphasizes that human-in-the-loop review and rigorous testing are essential to ensure agents reduce maintenance costs rather than increase output at the cost of code quality and stability.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech examines a failure mode of AI coding agents: generating technical debt when output goes unverified. The argument is that human-in-the-loop review and rigorous testing are necessary to keep agents from trading code quality and stability for raw output volume. The takeaway is that agents reduce maintenance costs only when verification gates their work, not when speed is the sole metric.
